mcp_tools.name: clickup_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Search and retrieve tasks, comments, and custom fields from the ClickUp workspace. Used to find project context, requirements, decisions, and historical documentation tasks.

mcp_tools.name: slack_adapter
mcp_tools.description: Search and retrieve messages, threads, and channel history from Slack. Used to find informal decisions, discussions, and knowledge not captured in formal documents.

mcp_tools.name: gmail_adapter
mcp_tools.description: Search and retrieve email threads from the connected Gmail account. Used to find decision communications, stakeholder approvals, and external correspondence.

mcp_tools.name: drive_adapter
mcp_tools.description: Search and retrieve documents, spreadsheets, and files from Google Drive. Used to find existing documentation, templates, and reference materials.

mcp_tools.name: nova_act_browser
mcp_tools.description: Primary web research tool. Uses Nova Act for intelligent web browsing, search, and content extraction. Preferred over Playwright for its natural language navigation capabilities.

mcp_tools.name: playwright_browser
mcp_tools.description: Fallback web research tool. Used when Nova Act is unavailable or encounters errors. Provides programmatic browser automation for web content retrieval.

mcp_tools.name: filesystem_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Local filesystem access for writing evidence packs and reading handoff payloads.

internal_tools.name: search_workspace
internal_tools.description: Unified search across all connected systems. Accepts a natural language query and returns results from ClickUp, Slack, Gmail, Drive, and web in a normalized format. Orchestrates individual tool calls internally.

systems.description: Which systems to search. Defaults to all.

internal_tools.name: fetch_document
internal_tools.description: Retrieve full content of a specific document by its URI. Handles different source types (ClickUp task, Drive doc, Slack thread, web page) and returns normalized content.

uri.description: The URI of the document to fetch.

internal_tools.name: create_evidence_pack
internal_tools.description: Compile all gathered sources, summary, and gaps into a structured evidence pack conforming to the evidence-schema.json specification. Validates the pack before writing to disk.
